description: Crafted from pure leather with a grosgrain fabric lining along the small pockets, this three-fold wallet from Newhide is a great addition to your everyday wardrobe. The soft natural leather removes bulk, making this a slim, sleek wallet for occasions when only the best will do. Leather for flexibility and suppleness Two main compartments Zippered storage space for coins and buttoned pocket for important cards A semi-transparent fibre chamber on the inside of the second fold to slip in photographs of your loved ones Care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
